description: Composition Black full length formal trousers with pin stripes, made of 65% polyester and 35% cotton, has a flat front with two pockets on the sides, brand name embroidered beside right pocket on the front, buttoned welt pocket on the right hip, and metal zipper and button closure Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside-out separately in warm water Do not bleach Tumble dry low Dry inside out in shade Warm iron Classy trousers are the mark of a gentleman. These black formal trousers from john miller will go a long way in making you the most sophisticated-looking man at any gathering. Made from the choicest of selected fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for office wear and any other formal occasion when you want to look your best effortlessly. Pair them with a crisp formal shirt and leather shoes to look spectacular. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 41" Height-6", Waist-32"
